Refresh or regenerate README.md for the current repository.

Follow `.github/skills/repo-readme-generator/SKILL.md` as the primary instruction source.

Use repository-native sources and avoid inventing details that are not supported by files in this repository.

Keep wording concise, practical, and in UK English.

Optimise the output for both GitHub and Packagist rendering.

Prefer active badges only.
